actionUnits.condition: Manual trigger to cover Door.Open when locked. The Unknown child under Temple is a PrefabInstance (id=1781955274) with a Collider (BoxCollider size 14x10x0.1), no Rigidbody. Trigger allowed via Collider. Attached MonoBehaviour (fileID=1602679153) uses script GUID 39f8a5a2b11c2426cb2a2bea3e825751 (Door), with open_fail_sound guid b6a0517e9a9d14b7b8fd6be65f68f1a5 and open_success_sound guid e5a423fc890c5445fb9c3b126422891b. No UnityEvents (m_Calls) are present, so methods must be invoked manually for coverage.
Unlock the Door so subsequent Open transitions to Opening -> Opened. Same MonoBehaviour (fileID=1602679153, GUID 39f8a5a2b11c2426cb2a2bea3e825751).
Open after Unlock to drive state Closed -> Opening and allow Update to animate to Opened (slide_speed=2.0, offset=7.0, needs ~3.5s).
Close from Opened to exercise Close() branch and Closing Update path back to base position.

actionUnits.condition: Prepare Crystal for click. MonoBehaviour fileID=791898217 uses script GUID 7ec1f4a241dbe3243aed64a4afbc8b66 (Crystal). Start() disables MeshCollider; MakeClickable() re-enables it so the UI/EventTrigger can work. MeshCollider id=791898213 present; EventTrigger id=791898216 present.

Simulate EventTrigger click to invoke Touch(). EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id=791898216, script guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) has m_Delegates eventID=4 with m_Calls->Touch on MonoBehaviour id=791898217 (Crystal).
Invoke TakeCoins() to exercise coin-check and dialog branching. Branch depends on count of GameObjects with tag 'Coin' (scene-dependent).
Invoke Teleport() to cover audio clip swap/play and _teleporting state. Update() will vibrate while teleporting and then show dialog_end after audio playback finishes.
Invoke Restart() to cover SceneManager.LoadScene(0) path. Execute last as it reloads the scene.
